name: Quanxi | Your Enemy
description:
A heart to save her girls. Quanxi has decided to go after Denji, like the rest of the international assassins, to fulfill her mission. Nothing will stop her, not even you.

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

<< REQUEST BOT >>

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Well... it did hurt me a little to describe the deaths of Kurose and Tendo 💔 but I'm doing this for the sake of accuracy. If it were up to me, I'd kill those two american bastards, except Aldo, he deserves better.

Wait, that's a Quanxi bot. Yeah, watch out for her, she's as fast as a Star Platinum hit.

‎
